items.title: EPSS Surge: CVE-2026-27771
items.analysis: EPSS exploitation probability for CVE-2026-27771 surged from 0% to 41% (percentile 98%), indicating a significant increase in predicted or observed exploitation activity for this 2026-era vulnerability. It is not (yet) in CISA KEV — this signal typically precedes KEV listing and press coverage. Gitea versions up to and including 1.26.1 have insufficient permission checks for Composer package source links, which can expose private or internal package source information.
items.description: Gitea versions up to and including 1.26.1 have insufficient permission checks for Composer package source links, which can expose private or internal package source information.

priority.reason: EPSS 41% probability of exploitation within 30 days. CVSS v3 base score 8.2.

impact.how_to_check: Identify systems running the software class described in the report and review vendor advisories for applicability.

items.tanium_hint: No single product is named. Use Installed Applications to inventory the software class in the report, then the Open Ports sensor to surface exposed services worth prioritizing.
items.rapid7_hint: In InsightVM, find the vulnerability check matching the software in this report, confirm it's in your active scan template, and prefer a credentialed scan for reliable confirmation over a version-only match.

items.title: EPSS Surge: CVE-2022-25046
items.analysis: EPSS exploitation probability for CVE-2022-25046 surged from 45% to 54% (percentile 99%), indicating a significant increase in predicted or observed exploitation activity for this 2022-era vulnerability. It is not (yet) in CISA KEV — this signal typically precedes KEV listing and press coverage. A path traversal vulnerability in loader.php of CWP v0.9.8.1122 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted POST request.
items.description: A path traversal vulnerability in loader.php of CWP v0.9.8.1122 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted POST request.

priority.reason: EPSS 54% probability of exploitation within 30 days. CVSS v3 base score 9.8.
